summary: OBE — six-vs-8/9 framing inconsistency the curmudgeon flagged in HOLE-9 of the EXP-183-proposal review is no longer present in current Part 4.6 prose. Verified via full-file scan of data/sections.json and data/wins.json: only 'six registry-level concessions' framing exists; no 'eight' / 'nine' / '8/9 concession' variants found. The opening paragraph already excludes per-WIN divergences explicitly. Section is internally consistent. See OBE-1 in EXP-304.
